def positive_pathlib_path_reconstructed_from_same_base_in_loop():
    rule_id = "pathlib_path_reconstructed_from_same_base_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that rebuild the same base Path object every iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
